options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Thank you for your message. I look forward to connecting with you when you return to Chicago. Please feel free to reach out at that time, and we can schedule a convenient time to meet or discuss further. I appreciate you staying in touch.

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Awesome! Let me know when you're back in Chicago and we can definitely hang out or catch up. It'll be great to see you in person! Just shoot me a message whenever you get back. 😊

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Sounds good! Hit me up when you're back in Chicago.
